fields.title: agent: recover worker overflow with auto-compaction instead of failing
fields.description: Background worker agents currently treat assistant stopReason=error as terminal immediately after session.prompt()/agent_end. When pi-coding-agent detects a context overflow (e.g. OpenAI/Codex context_length_exceeded), it schedules auto-compaction and retry asynchronously after agent_end. Tau worker code races that recovery path and publishes failed status before compaction completes, breaking agent wait loops. Desired behavior: preserve worker running state through auto-compaction, retry automatically, and only fail after compaction recovery definitively ends without retry/success.
